title: Roswell Army Air Field Reports Recovery of 'Flying Disc'
detail: Roswell Army Air Field public information officer Walter Haut issues press release stating the 509th Bomb Group has recovered a 'flying disc' from a ranch near Roswell, New Mexico. Hours later, Brig. Gen. Roger Ramey announces the debris is a weather balloon. Ranch foreman W.W. 'Mac' Brazel had initially reported unusual debris. The 1994 USAF report identified the debris as from Project Mogul, a classified nuclear test detection program. The 1997 USAF 'Case Closed' report attributed 'alien body' reports to anthropomorphic test dummies dropped during parachute experiments in the 1950s.

media.caption: Smithsonian: What Really Happened at Roswell
